hypothesis_queue.hypothesis: Signal-reconfirmed hold extension: at max_hold (390 bars), if the ticker would qualify as a FRESH entry right now (lgbm_pred_return > dynamic cost threshold AND dir_prob >= 0.60), extend the hold one more day instead of exiting — equivalent to a re-entry without paying the round-trip spread. Hard caps: max 2 extensions (3 days absolute), stops/trail/target always active, extension NEVER allowed if position is at a loss > 1x daily vol. Owner intuition (2026-07-11): 'let winners run past the time limit'. Evidence FOR: max_hold exits are 100% of post-fix exits, 5W/4L. Evidence AGAINST: June backtest showed unconditional 3-day holds = -493bps beta bleed — which is exactly why the extension must be signal-conditional, not unconditional.
hypothesis_queue.test: python scripts/research_backtest.py with hold-extension variant (compare: baseline 1-day vs signal-reconfirmed extension, report Sharpe/PF/WR/DD/n per leg)
implementation_summary: Added SIZING_MAX_HOLD_EXTENSIONS = 2 constant (1 baseline + 2 extensions = 3 days absolute cap).
Added _hold_extensions: dict[str, int] per-ticker counter to SignalLoop.__init__.
Added _signal_reconfirms_hold(sig): checks pred_return > dynamic_cost_threshold AND dir_prob >= 0.60 (same quality bar as a new entry, but without portfolio/IC/Kelly gates since we’re already in).
Modified _check_sizing_exit: at bars >= next_exit_bars (390/780/1170), grants extension if (extensions < 2 AND unrealized > -1×daily_vol AND signal reconfirms). Falls through to 'max_hold' otherwise.
Added _hold_extensions.pop(ticker) to _clear_sizing_state to prevent phantom cap on re-entry.
Fixed test_signal_loop.py: made `import torch` conditional so all signal_loop tests can run without torch installed.
Added 12 new unit tests covering: _signal_reconfirms_hold helper (3 cases), extension granted/counter/spurious-exit/2nd-extension/max-cap/weak-signal/loss-guard/state-cleared/constant-guard.
123 passed / 2 skipped (torch) / 0 failures.
hypothesis_queue.index_risk_quant_verdict: APPROVED_FOR_STAGING — no lookahead (extension uses only real-time signal at the check bar), stops/trail/target always remain active (price-based exits run first), 3-day absolute cap preserves the June-validated ceiling, fail-safe guard (unrealized > -1×daily_vol) prevents extending underwater positions. N unknown until Railway backtest — hypothesis requires data run for Sharpe/PF/WR/DD/n comparison vs. baseline.
hypothesis_queue.expected_impact: Among the 9 max_hold exits (5W/4L), reconfirmed signals would extend winners past day 1. Quantified impact unknown until Railway backtest. Mechanism: captures multi-day momentum when model maintains conviction, without paying re-entry spread cost.
